---
title: Bits - Small Side Projects
---
___

## This Site
- Built in R markdown, converted to html, hosted with GitHub pages

## R Shiny Traffic
- *Work in progress*
- Learning R Shiny by building an interactive visualisation of traffic on each road of the network from my masters project
- Github [repo](http://github.com/tubestubes/RShiny_traffic)
- Interactive web [app](https://tubestubes.shinyapps.io/shiny_traffic/)
